article_context: The image functions as an article illustration in the section on signs of magnesium deficiency, immediately following a list of symptoms such as fatigue, headaches, muscle weakness, cramps, tingling, and nervous tics. Its editorial focus is the visible feeling of nervous and muscular distress that the surrounding text frames as a possible warning signal from the body.
base_scene: A visibly tense woman faces the viewer with her hands raised beside her face. Her anxious physical tension gradually intensifies through a shallow inhale, a slight tightening of her fingers, and a brief eyelid twitch, ending at the peak of the same strained reaction.
image_reading: Close frontal portrait of a wide-eyed woman grimacing directly toward the camera, with both hands raised prominently beside her face.
Her spread, curled fingers, tense jaw, and fixed gaze communicate acute nervous tension; the hands and facial muscles provide the clearest natural motion.

models.positive_prompt: Slowly push in as the woman takes a shallow inhale and her anxious tension steadily builds. Her raised fingers curl slightly tighter toward her face, her jaw clenches, and one eyelid gives a brief subtle twitch near the end. Keep it one continuous restrained reaction, ending at the peak of tension.
models.scene_plan: Over four seconds, use one gentle camera push-in while the woman's existing anxious pose develops into a stronger but restrained physical reaction. A shallow inhale lifts her shoulders slightly, her fingers gradually tighten inward, and a subtle eyelid twitch appears late in the motion. The shot ends near the peak of tension, without a separate release or second beat.
